title: Recommendation
description: Influencer recommendation record linking a tweet to a specific ticker with price tracking.

tweet_url.description: URL of the source tweet (e.g. https://twitter.com/.../status/...).

matched_text.description: Original text fragment that matched the ticker mapping.

extraction_source.description: Method used to extract the ticker from tweet text.

display_name.description: Human-readable display name of the influencer.

categories.description: Classification categories assigned to the source tweet.

is_contrarian.description: Whether the influencer is a contrarian indicator (bullish tweets -> warning signals).

price_at_recommendation.description: Asset price at the recommendation date. Null if unavailable.
